title: clematopsis teuszii
side_effects: Clematopsis teuszii can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Long-term use can also lead to gastrointestinal problems, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its toxic compounds. Additionally, improper use of this plant can cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. In extreme cases, excessive consumption can result in kidney or liver damage, making it essential to use clematopsis teuszii under the guidance of a medical professional.
